name: Avatar
intent: Display a user or entity representation as image, icon, or text initials.

name: Badge
intent: Non-interactive display component used to highlight status, provide notifications, or categorize content. Supports start/end slots for icons and sub-badges.

name: BottomNavigation
intent: App-level bottom navigation bar. Accepts 2–5 <BottomNavItem> children with a shared `labelType` (none / 1line / 2line). Supports controlled or uncontrolled active value, multi-accent appearance roles, and an optional top hairline divider.

name: Button
intent: Trigger a single user action with clear emphasis and accessible states.

name: Checkbox
intent: Binary selection control for forms and settings with tri-state (indeterminate) support.

name: CheckboxField
intent: `Field.Root` + **Checkbox** with integrated `Field.Label` / `Field.Description`, optional `infoIconSlot`, `error` / `feedback`, native `Field.Error` slot, and optional `InputDynamicText` row — same composition contract as **InputField** (Figma `.DNA/InputField` stack; control DNA from Checkbox). Colour follows `appearance` on the inner Checkbox.

name: Chip
intent: Compact interactive label for filtering, tagging, or selecting values.

name: ChipGroup
intent: Groups multiple Chip components with shared selection state, keyboard navigation, and layout. Supports single-select (default) and multi-select modes. Propagates size, variant, and appearance to all child Chips.

name: CircularProgressIndicator
intent: Circular progress arc. Determinate variant renders an arc proportional to `value`; indeterminate renders a spinning animation. Optional center content (icon or auto percentage). 10 t-shirt sizes. Multi-accent appearance roles.

name: Container
intent: Page-level width container. `fluid` grows with the viewport (default). `fixed` caps at --Grid-MaxWidth per platform and centers. `full-bleed` is edge-to-edge for hero sections and full-width media.

name: CounterBadge
intent: Non-interactive display component showing a numeric count with bold/subtle/ghost variants and multi-accent support.

name: Divider
intent: Visual separator between sections, list items, or content groups.

name: Icon
intent: Render a semantic or custom icon with configurable size, colour role, and emphasis level.

name: IconButton
intent: Trigger compact single actions with icon-only affordance.

name: IconContained
intent: Display an icon within a filled container shape with attention-level emphasis.

name: Image
intent: Display an image with aspect ratio presets, loading states, and optional interactive overlay.

name: IndicatorBadge
intent: Non-interactive status/presence indicator dot. Supports multi-accent appearance roles and five sizes.

name: Input
intent: Low-level single-line text entry control. Use standalone only when you do not need a visible label, helper text, or validation chrome; otherwise compose it inside InputField.

name: InputField
intent: Text input field: `Field.Root` + **Input** (`Field.Label` / `Field.Description` for label-stack copy, `Field.Control` for the `<input>`, 4-slot shell), then `InputFeedback` (including native `Field.Error` when there is no string `error` / custom `feedback`), and DynamicText. Default info uses `IconButton` + `Tooltip` (override with `infoIconSlot`). Optional `labelSlot` replaces string `label` / `description`.

name: Logo
intent: A visual mark that identifies and reinforces brand identity throughout the interface. Transparent size container — the SVG content controls its own shape and colors.

name: Modal
intent: Focused overlay with structured header/body/footer layout and scroll management. The modal popup is role-neutral; per-role styling is applied to the slot children (footer buttons, headerStart, body content).

name: Pagination
intent: Numbered page navigation for paged result sets (search results, tables, listings). Shows first/last + a window of pages around the current one, with optional prev/next arrows.

name: PaginationDots
intent: Windowed pagination indicator for carousels and multi-page content. Shows a fixed window of dots that scroll with the active index. Edge dots shrink to signal more content on either side. Supports loop (infinite) and non-loop (end-grow) modes. Fully accessible: roving tabindex, keyboard nav, aria-selected.

name: Radio
intent: Single-selection control within a mutually-exclusive option group.

name: RadioField
intent: `Field.Root` + **RadioGroup** with optional `Field.Label` / `Field.Description`, `infoIconSlot`, `error` / `feedback`, native `Field.Error` slot, and optional `InputDynamicText` row — same shell as **InputField** / **CheckboxField**. Integrated single mode has no `Radio` children; colour follows **`appearance`** on inner radios.

name: SelectableButton
intent: Toggle button with text label and optional start/end slots for binary selection within groups.

name: SelectableIconButton
intent: Icon-only toggle button for compact binary selection with configurable shape layout.

name: SelectableSingleTextButton
intent: Text-only toggle button for binary selection — no start/end slots, simpler than SelectableButton.

name: SingleTextButton
intent: Circular single-text action button (max 2 characters, e.g. "Ag", "En"). Attention level drives the visual: high=bold fill, medium=subtle fill, low=ghost. 3 sizes (S/M/L). Shape customisable per brand.

name: Slider
intent: Precision range input. Multi-accent appearance, inside/outside knob styles, optional step ticks, and a value tooltip that follows the thumb.

name: Stepper
intent: Numeric input control with increment and decrement buttons for bounded integer values.

name: Surface
intent: Container primitive that opts descendants into the OneUI surface cascade via [data-surface]. The `mode` prop maps to one of the 7 canonical surface tokens (default/ghost/minimal/subtle/moderate/bold/elevated). Optional transparent material composites over arbitrary media.

name: Switch
intent: Immediate binary toggle — state takes effect on change without a submit action.

name: Tabs
intent: Accessible tabbed navigation. Uses Base UI Tabs primitive for keyboard navigation, arrow/Home/End keys, and automatic focus management. Three sizes (S/M/L), two orientations (horizontal/vertical). Matching Figma spec: selected tab gets an animated tinted indicator, tinted-accessible label color, and a surface-aware double-ring focus halo. Supports start + end content slots; icon + badge are legacy aliases.

name: Text
intent: Inline / block text. Six typography roles with role-specific size scales, canonical multi-accent appearance, attention levels, italic / underline / strikethrough, latin / multi-script font fallback, and line-clamp truncation. Defaults to `span`; set `as` for headings or anchors. When using the `text` prop with the `link` slot, avoid `aria-hidden` on the root unless the link is decorative — the slot remains focusable.

name: Tooltip
intent: Floating hover / focus label that attaches to a trigger element. Supports the Figma position alias (top/topStart/topEnd/...), Base UI side+align, controlled/uncontrolled open state, arrow, portal, and configurable delay.

name: TouchSlider
intent: Chunky fingertip-friendly slider. The track is the tap target; the fill represents the value. Ideal for touch devices, TV remotes, and large-target contexts.
